title: Foster Parent/Family Recruitment * Native American Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Foster Parent/Family Recruitment * Native American Community 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Developmental Issues Native American Community Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF NATIVE AMERICAN YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER FOSTER CARE SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps Native youth and families involved with foster care by offering cultural support, connecting them to community resources, and assisting with reunification or finding permanent homes. Services include group meetings, support classes, and family events. Also recruits and supports Native American foster families, guiding them through the certification process. Services for foster parents include Positive Indian Parenting classes, Sibling and Family Night events, and help with genealogy and regalia. Does not provide legal advice. 5135 NE Columbia Boulevard Portland, OR 97218 Eligibility: Native American youth ages 0-24 who are in state or tribal foster care systems, their birth parents, and their foster parents. Young adults who have aged out of foster care can receive services through age 24. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 288-8177 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIVE AMERICAN YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER FOSTER CARE SUPPORT
